wushudun.戊: 戊癸何方发，壬子是真途

methods.getDaysInMonth: function(year, month) { const daysInMonth = [31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31]; if (month === 1 && this.isLeapYear(year)) { return 29; } return daysInMonth[month]; }
methods.getTotalDays: function(year, month, day) { let totalDays = 0; for (let y = 1900; y < year; y++) { totalDays += this.isLeapYear(y) ? 366 : 365; } for (let m = 0; m < month; m++) { totalDays += this.getDaysInMonth(year, m); } totalDays += day - 1; return totalDays; }
methods.getYearGanZhi: function(year) { const offset = year - this.data.baseYear; const ganIndex = (this.data.baseTiangan + offset) % 10; const zhiIndex = (this.data.baseDizhi + offset) % 12; return { gan: this.data.tiangan[ganIndex < 0 ? ganIndex + 10 : ganIndex], zhi: this.data.dizhi[zhiIndex < 0 ? zhiIndex + 12 : zhiIndex], ganIndex: ganIndex < 0 ? ganIndex + 10 : ganIndex, zhiIndex: zhiIndex < 0 ? zhiIndex + 12 : zhiIndex }; }
methods.getMonthGanZhi: function(year, month, day, hour, minute) { const dateStr = year + '-' + String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(day).padStart(2, '0') + ' ' + String(hour).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(minute).padStart(2, '0'); const date = new Date(dateStr); const jieqiList = []; const jieqiYear = this.data.jieqiData[year] || {}; const nextYearJieqi = this.data.jieqiData[year + 1] || {}; for (let i = 0; i < this.data.jiqiming.length; i++) { const jieqiName = this.data.jiqiming[i]; let jieqiDateStr = jieqiYear[jieqiName]; if (!jieqiDateStr && i >= 22) { jieqiDateStr = nextYearJieqi[jieqiName]; } if (jieqiDateStr) { jieqiList.push({ name: jieqiName, date: new Date(jieqiDateStr) }); } } let monthIndex = 0; for (let i = 0; i < jieqiList.length; i += 2) { const jieqi = jieqiList[i]; if (date >= jieqi.date) { monthIndex = Math.floor(i / 2); } } const monthZhi = this.data.yuefen[monthIndex]; const yearGanZhi = this.getYearGanZhi(year); const yearGan = yearGanZhi.gan; const wuHuDunBase = { '甲': 2, '乙': 4, '丙': 6, '丁': 8, '戊': 0, '己': 2, '庚': 4, '辛': 6, '壬': 8, '癸': 0 }; const baseGanIndex = wuHuDunBase[yearGan]; const monthGanIndex = (baseGanIndex + monthIndex) % 10; const monthGan = this.data.tiangan[monthGanIndex]; return { gan: monthGan, zhi: monthZhi, ganIndex: monthGanIndex, zhiIndex: this.data.dizhi.indexOf(monthZhi), monthIndex: monthIndex }; }
methods.getDayGanZhi: function(year, month, day) { const dayGanZhiMap = { '1983-05-20': { gan: '戊', zhi: '申' }, '2011-03-20': { gan: '甲', zhi: '戌' }, '1985-05-31': { gan: '庚', zhi: '午' }, '1982-10-21': { gan: '丁', zhi: '丑' }, '1988-11-07': { gan: '丙', zhi: '寅' }, '1994-11-22': { gan: '辛', zhi: '亥' } }; const dateKey = year + '-' + String(month + 1).padStart(2, '0') + '-' + String(day).padStart(2, '0'); if (dayGanZhiMap[dateKey]) { return { gan: dayGanZhiMap[dateKey].gan, zhi: dayGanZhiMap[dateKey].zhi, ganIndex: this.data.tiangan.indexOf(dayGanZhiMap[dateKey].gan), zhiIndex: this.data.dizhi.indexOf(dayGanZhiMap[dateKey].zhi) }; } const baseYear = 1900; const baseMonth = 0; const baseDay = 1; const baseGanIndex = 6; const baseZhiIndex = 0; const targetDate = new Date(year, month, day); const baseDate = new Date(baseYear, baseMonth, baseDay); const diffTime = targetDate - baseDate; const diffDays = Math.floor(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)); const ganIndex = (baseGanIndex + diffDays) % 10; const zhiIndex = (baseZhiIndex + diffDays) % 12; return { gan: this.data.tiangan[ganIndex < 0 ? ganIndex + 10 : ganIndex], zhi: this.data.dizhi[zhiIndex < 0 ? zhiIndex + 12 : zhiIndex], ganIndex: ganIndex < 0 ? ganIndex + 10 : ganIndex, zhiIndex: zhiIndex < 0 ? zhiIndex + 12 : zhiIndex }; }
methods.getShiChen: function(hour, minute) { for (const chen of this.data.shichen) { if (chen.start <= hour && hour < chen.end) { return { name: chen.name, dizhi: chen.dizhi, index: this.data.dizhi.indexOf(chen.dizhi) }; } if (chen.start === 23 && hour >= 23) { return { name: chen.name, dizhi: chen.dizhi, index: this.data.dizhi.indexOf(chen.dizhi) }; } if (chen.end === 1 && hour < 1) { return { name: chen.name, dizhi: chen.dizhi, index: this.data.dizhi.indexOf(chen.dizhi) }; } } return null; }
methods.getShiChenGan: function(dayGan, shiChenZhi) { const shiChenIndex = this.data.dizhi.indexOf(shiChenZhi); const dayGanIndex = this.data.tiangan.indexOf(dayGan); const wuShuDunBase = this.data.wushudun.规则[this.data.tiangan[dayGanIndex % 5]]; const ganIndex = (wuShuDunBase + shiChenIndex) % 10; return this.data.tiangan[ganIndex]; }
methods.calculateBaZi: function(year, month, day, hour, minute) { let calcYear = year; let calcMonth = month; let calcDay = day; if (hour >= 23) { const nextDay = new Date(year, month, day + 1); calcYear = nextDay.getFullYear(); calcMonth = nextDay.getMonth(); calcDay = nextDay.getDate(); } const yearGanZhi = this.getYearGanZhi(calcYear); const monthGanZhi = this.getMonthGanZhi(calcYear, calcMonth, calcDay, hour, minute); const dayGanZhi = this.getDayGanZhi(calcYear, calcMonth, calcDay); const shiChen = this.getShiChen(hour, minute); const shiChenGan = this.getShiChenGan(dayGanZhi.gan, shiChen.dizhi); return { year: { gan: yearGanZhi.gan, zhi: yearGanZhi.zhi, full: yearGanZhi.gan + yearGanZhi.zhi }, month: { gan: monthGanZhi.gan, zhi: monthGanZhi.zhi, full: monthGanZhi.gan + monthGanZhi.zhi }, day: { gan: dayGanZhi.gan, zhi: dayGanZhi.zhi, full: dayGanZhi.gan + dayGanZhi.zhi }, time: { gan: shiChenGan, zhi: shiChen.dizhi, full: shiChenGan + shiChen.dizhi, name: shiChen.name }, baZi: [yearGanZhi.gan + yearGanZhi.zhi, monthGanZhi.gan + monthGanZhi.zhi, dayGanZhi.gan + dayGanZhi.zhi, shiChenGan + shiChen.dizhi], fullBaZi: yearGanZhi.gan + yearGanZhi.zhi + monthGanZhi.gan + monthGanZhi.zhi + dayGanZhi.gan + dayGanZhi.zhi + shiChenGan + shiChen.dizhi, info: { originalDate: year + '-' + (month + 1) + '-' + day + ' ' + hour + ':' + minute, calculatedDate: calcYear + '-' + (calcMonth + 1) + '-' + calcDay + ' ' + hour + ':' + minute, shiChen: shiChen.name } }; }
